entries.title: Workable integration & SEO overhaul
highlights: Added **Workable** as a new job source — companies posting on Workable now appear on WorkWay automatically.
Replaced all hidden headings and motion-animated content with proper semantic HTML, so every page is fully visible to search engines.
Job descriptions now display in full — no more "Show more" truncation.
Added the **latest changelog** card to the jobs feed sidebar.

entries.title: Job detail page refresh
highlights: Redesigned the **single job page** for better readability on smaller screens.
Job pages now show the **posted time** (e.g. "3 days ago") so you know how fresh each listing is.
Improved page titles and canonical URLs across all job and company pages.

entries.title: Skills tagging & salary insights
highlights: Skills mentioned in job descriptions are now **linked** — click any skill to see all related jobs.
Launched **Salary Insights** page for roles that include compensation data.
Jobs near your viewed listing now appear in a **"Jobs near you"** section.
Company matching is now smarter with **semantic embeddings** — better duplicate detection and related-company suggestions.

entries.title: User accounts & saved jobs
highlights: Sign in with a **magic link** — no password needed.
**Save jobs** you're interested in and come back to them later.
**Follow companies** to get alerts when they post new roles.
Track your **applications** in one place.

entries.title: Ashby jobs & compensation data
highlights: Added **Ashby** as a job source — hundreds of new roles from companies using Ashby's ATS.
Jobs with salary info now display **compensation badges** (salary range, equity, bonus).
Added **career guides** with FAQs and role-specific advice to help you prepare.

entries.title: Location-based job pages
highlights: Browse jobs by location — dedicated pages like **"Software Engineer jobs in Bangalore"** for every city and role combination.
Added a **Jobs by Location** hub page to explore all available cities.
Each location page includes proper SEO metadata and structured data for search engines.

entries.title: Company search & recently posted
highlights: Search for any company on WorkWay with the new **company search**.
Company pages now show a **"Recently Posted"** section highlighting jobs added in the last few days.
Company logos are now hosted and served from **Cloudflare R2** for faster loading.

entries.title: Location programmatic SEO
highlights: Auto-generated **role + location** pages (e.g. "Data Analyst jobs in Mumbai") for better search discoverability.
Dynamic sitemaps now include all valid location combinations for Google indexing.

entries.title: Recently viewed jobs
highlights: Added a **Recently Viewed** section on the jobs feed — your last 10 visited job listings are saved locally and shown at the top.
Works fully client-side using `localStorage`, so your history persists across page refreshes.
Each recently viewed card shows the job title, company, and location for quick re-access.

entries.title: Feedback page & changelog
highlights: Added a dedicated **Feedback** page so you can tell us what to improve.
Launched this public **Changelog** to track visible product changes.
You can edit this page by updating `src/content/changelog.json`.

entries.title: Job page improvements
highlights: Job detail pages now load significantly faster with improved server-side rendering.
Added **Apply** button pinned to the bottom on mobile for easier access.
Structured data (`JobPosting` schema) added to all job pages for better search visibility.

entries.title: Improved search & filters
highlights: Filter jobs by **employment type** (full-time, part-time, contract, internship).
Location filter now supports remote-first search — filter by `Remote` to find fully distributed roles.
Search queries are now reflected in the URL, making filtered results shareable.

entries.title: Next.js migration & new job feed
highlights: Migrated the main WorkWay experience to the new **Next.js** app.
Introduced the new **Jobs** feed with better filters and faster navigation.
Improved SEO and structured data for job and company pages.
